title: عدم مشروعیت مجاهدین خلق به پارلمان المان
description:
مجاهدین خلق در حال ارسال ایمیل به مقامات دولت آلمان برای تحویل سفارت ایران به "دولت موقت" خود هستند.

مجاهدین خلق یک فرقه مارکسیستی-اسلامی خطرناک است که نماینده مردم ایران نیست. این گروه بارها و بارها نشان داده است که برای رسیدن به قدرت به هر کاری دست می‌زند، حتی کشتن اعضا و هموطنان خود.

ما ایمیلی به زبان آلمانی اماده کردیم که حقیقت رو به گوش مقامات دولت آلمان به خصوص شخص صدر اعظم فردریش مرتز برسونیم.

subject_base: Concern Regarding MEK Lobbying Efforts and Representation of the Iranian People
body_base:
Dear Members of Parliament, Esteemed Journalists, and Media Representatives,

We are writing to express our serious concern regarding reports that the organization known as the Mojahedin-e Khalq (MEK) is contacting German government officials with requests to transfer control of Iranian diplomatic missions to what they refer to as a "Provisional Government."

As Iranian citizens and members of the Iranian diaspora, we feel compelled to clearly state that the MEK does not represent the Iranian people.

The MEK is a controversial organization with a long and complex history. It has previously been designated as a terrorist organization by the United States, Canada, and the European Union. Although some of these designations were later lifted, the group remains widely rejected among Iranians both inside and outside the country. Numerous human rights reports and academic studies have documented concerns regarding the organization's internal structure, cult-like practices, lack of democratic transparency, and intolerance of dissent.

At a time when the Iranian people are struggling for freedom, dignity, and genuine democratic representation, it is crucial that no unelected and unaccountable organization be granted diplomatic legitimacy or recognition without clear and broad-based support from the Iranian population.

The transfer of any Iranian diplomatic representation to a group that lacks democratic legitimacy would risk undermining the credibility of European institutions and could have serious political and security consequences.

We respectfully urge German and European officials, as well as media organizations, to carefully examine:

The MEK's historical record and past designations

Its level of support among ordinary Iranians

Its internal governance structure and commitment to democratic principles

The potential geopolitical and security implications of granting it formal recognition

The future of Iran must be determined by the Iranian people through transparent, democratic, and inclusive processes — not through lobbying campaigns conducted by organizations that do not enjoy broad public legitimacy.

We, the Iranians of Europe and other countries, gathered in Munich on February 14, 2026, to support Prince Reza Pahlavi as a transitional government, and we did, and he is our representative, and we ask you to support this demand of us Iranians and give a significant response to the MEK in the media. And the German media should reflect this.

We appreciate your attention to this urgent matter and stand ready to provide further information if needed.
